channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Database Manager Dismissed for Falsifying Work-from-Home Timesheets
item.description: An IT professional at Hansen Corporation was dismissed after it was discovered he had been falsifying his work-from-home timesheets. Despite claiming to work 7.5 hours per day, records showed he logge...

item.title: Ensuring Strong Governance to Protect Kenya’s Health System
item.description: The health sector in Kenya is at a critical point, and the Constitution of Kenya guarantees every citizen the right to the highest attainable standard of health, including access to reproductive and e...

item.title: CPM announces 86 candidates for Kerala assembly elections, LDF optimistic of victory
item.description: On 16th March 2026, the Communist Party of India (Marxist) announced that it will contest 86 assembly constituencies in Kerala for the upcoming elections. The party named 81 candidates, which include ...

item.title: SANDF Chief Declares Tough Stance Against Criminals During Deployment to Crime Hotspots
item.description: The Chief of the South African National Defence Force (SANDF), Gen Rudzani Maphwanya, has stated that soldiers deployed to assist in fighting crime will take decisive action against criminals and will...

item.title: Tanzania strengthens health training to improve disease surveillance
item.description: Tanzania imeanza mpango mpya wenye lengo la kuboresha mfumo wa taifa wa ufuatiliaji wa magonjwa kwa kuingiza mfumo wa Integrated Disease Surveillance and Response (IDSR) kwenye mafunzo ya afya. Hii in...

item.title: CNN Commentator Questions US War Spending on Iran, Urges Focus on Domestic Healthcare Instead

item.title: Authorities Respond to Fire Near Dubai Airport Following Drone Incident
item.description: On March 16, 2026, the Dubai Media Office confirmed that a fire had broken out near Dubai International Airport following a drone-related incident. Authorities immediately responded to control the sit...

item.title: Three Tanzanian Women Selected for Free IVF Treatment in Dar es Salaam
item.description: Dar es Salaam recently celebrated International Women’s Day with a special initiative by Kairuki Health Education Network (KHEN), where three women were chosen to receive free In Vitro Fertilization (...

item.title: Murrieta Parents Arrested for House Fire That Killed Two Daughters
item.description: Authorities have arrested Stacey Hales, 46, and Adam Keenan, 43, parents of two young girls who died in a house fire in Murrieta, California. The fire occurred in the early hours of December 20, 2025,...

item.title: Highlights from the 2026 Oscars: Tie for Best Short Film and Sean Penn absent from ceremony
item.description: The 98th Academy Awards, hosted by Conan O'Brien at the Dolby Theatre in Los Angeles, were marked by both celebration and controversy. 'Sinners' led the nominations with a record 16 nods, while 'One B...

item.title: Woman charged with murder of her 18-day-old daughter after baby fell from height in Westminster
item.description: A tragic incident occurred in central London on Saturday morning, 14 March 2026, when an 18-day-old baby girl fell from a height at a residential property on Horseferry Road in Westminster. Metropolit...

item.title: Sudan's Energy Sector Faces Severe Strain Amid Ongoing Conflict and Corruption
item.description: Sudan's energy sector is under severe pressure as the war between the Sudan Founding Alliance forces and the Port Sudan-affiliated army enters its third year. The General Union of Workers in Electrici...

item.title: 81-Year-Old Charged with Second-Degree Murder Following Port Alberni Shooting
item.description: An 81-year-old man from Port Alberni, British Columbia, has been charged with second-degree murder and attempted murder following a shooting at a local trailer park on March 13, 2026. The Port Alberni...

item.title: Body of diver retrieved after week-long search at Cheploch Gorge
item.description: The body of Rodgers Kiplimo, a 25-year-old diver from Emsea village in Keiyo South, was recovered after an exhausting eight-day search at Cheploch Gorge, located on the border of Baringo and Elgeyo Ma...

item.title: Overview of Australians and Major Contenders at the 2026 Oscars
item.description: The 98th Academy Awards took place in Los Angeles, spotlighting major contenders and notable Australians up for Oscars. Australian actress Rose Byrne received her first best actress nomination for her...

item.title: Ephraim Escudero’s death during Duterte’s drug war clarified: EJK vs riding-in-tandem context
item.description: A viral post on social media claimed that Ephraim Escudero, brother of Sheerah Escudero, was not a victim of extrajudicial killings (EJK) but was killed by riding-in-tandem assailants. The post, widel...

item.title: Behind the scenes: The cast and creators prepare for Saturday Night Live UK's debut on Sky
item.description: Saturday Night Live UK, a British adaptation of the iconic American sketch comedy show, is set to premiere on Sky One and Now on 21 March 2026. The article provides an inside look at the preparations,...

item.title: PRASA Initiates Independent Investigation into Alleged Gang Connections in Cape Town Central Line Project
item.description: The Passenger Rail Agency of South Africa (PRASA) has confirmed it will launch an independent review following allegations of irregular subcontracting tied to the Cape Town Central Line recovery proje...

item.title: US Officials Criticise CNN Reporting on Iran Conflict
item.description: On Friday, the Pentagon and White House strongly criticised CNN for its coverage of the ongoing Iran conflict. Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth called one report by CNN 'patently ridiculous' and express...

item.title: Coverage of the 2026 Academy Awards Red Carpet and Key Highlights
item.description: The 2026 Academy Awards kicked off with comedian Conan O'Brien opening the show with his signature humour. Stars from around the world made their way down the red carpet, showcasing a variety of colou...
